mapper.sql: a.id as id, a.zuoye_id as zuoyeId, a.yonghu_id as yonghuId, a.submit_file as submitFile, a.submit_content as submitContent, a.submit_status as submitStatus, a.answer_snapshot as answerSnapshot, a.question_snapshot as questionSnapshot, a.auto_score as autoScore, a.submit_score as submitScore, a.submit_remark as submitRemark, a.submit_delete as submitDelete, a.check_time as checkTime, a.insert_time as insertTime, a.create_time as createTime
